text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ouch!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I screwed up... I think I twisted my ankle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check the swollen area and find it hotter than
expected. This may warrant extra caution.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Don't get any ideas! I can still run. Believe me.
choice_data_list: Let's take it easy for a while.
I'll do my best to patch you up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: For a while... Hey, how long is that?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We don't have that kind of time. It's fine, so let's
just hurry up and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that running while trying to bear the
pain may lead to unwanted changes in her running
form.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch! Fine. You have a point.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll hold off for now...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Okay, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian grimaces the moment I start patching
her up.
choice_data_list: I think we need to take the day off, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, this is noth—ouch!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch! Fine. If that's what you think is best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Forced to take a break, Narita Brian doesn't look
happy when she leaves the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All right, thanks. I want to get back to training as
soon as you're done wrapping me up.
choice_data_list: I'm not gonna let you overdo things.
I'm not gonna let you overdo things.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph, overdo it? You're a trainer, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Whatever happens, you know how to bandage
and apply ice. And I know you'll take care of me
properly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, what's with the grin? Just take care of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The treatment is effective and Narita Brian
overcomes her injury.
